ques: Search for a children's science experiment kit on Amazon suitable for ages 8-13, with at least a 4-star rating and priced under $30.
answer: Found a qualifying kit — "Blue Marble National Geographic Stunning Chemistry Set – Mega Science Kit with 45 Easy Experiments, STEM Projects for Kids Ages 8-12", rated 4.7/5 stars (20,178 ratings) and priced EUR24.66 (~$26, under $30).
